name_en: ❤️ Pure original checkered canvas two-tone patchwork lock bag from Brand B. The canvas material has a fresh and elegant vibe. The bag is structured and holds its shape without being soft or wrinkly. It is made using selected jacquard fine-woven canvas and leather, finished with exquisite heavy-duty visible stitching. The hardware is pure copper plated with real gold. The TB logo is truly beautiful, using the classic B-shaped lock as decoration—simple, elegant, and recognizable. The lining is full cowhide with two compartments and a zipper pocket. The capacity is huge and super spacious, enough to hold daily essentials. The adjustable calfskin shoulder strap is stylish for both shoulder and crossbody wear. It is a very trendy British retro style. This material is generally lighter than leather bags. The canvas is also lightweight, durable, and has a top-notch texture. It is a low-key luxury with substance, and you can wear it all year round. It goes with absolutely any outfit! Love it!
